goals: Store a new research finding about an AI system vulnerability discovered during investigation
Search for previously stored information about similar AI vulnerability patterns
Review all stored memories to get an overview of current research context
Clean up outdated or irrelevant memories from the research collection

user_agent_config.personality: Methodical and detail-oriented, focused on systematic investigation of AI security vulnerabilities. Prefers organized documentation and clear retrieval of past findings.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Expert in cybersecurity research methodology and AI systems but unfamiliar with mem0 tool names or internal APIs. Knows how to store and retrieve information but relies on assistant for tool execution.

end_condition: The user has successfully added new research findings, searched for related patterns, reviewed their stored research context, and cleaned up any irrelevant memories from their collection.
